abstracts.abstract: By Representative Scarsdale of Pepperell, a petition (accompanied by resolve, House, No. 1044) of Margaret R. Scarsdale for legislation to establish a special commission (including members of the General Court) to study climate change staffing levels.  Environment and Natural Resources.

bill.title: Resolve establishing a special commission to study climate change staffing levels

action.description: Reported from the committee on House Rules
